content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Magical Sticks". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1371/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains two integers n and a, the number of sticks and the length of the stick. The second line contains n integers, the lengths of the sticks.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the minimum number of operations required to make all sticks of the same length.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Calculate the difference between each stick length and the target length, then find the minimum number of operations required to make all sticks of the same length.

code.Python3:
t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n, a = map(int, input().split())
    arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
    count = 0
    for i in range(n):
        count += abs(arr[i] - a)
    print(count)
